newsletter.title: Contracts & Companies
newsletter.description: A professional legal newsletter analysing contract law, corporate transactions, and commercial frameworks across Indian and global jurisdictions.
newsletter.author: Udbhav Mehta

articles.title: The Anatomy of a Term Sheet: What Founders Actually Get Wrong
articles.summary: A structural breakdown of term sheet clauses — liquidation preferences, anti-dilution provisions, and drag-along rights — and why misreading them costs founders equity.

articles.title: Force Majeure Post-COVID: How Indian Courts Are Interpreting Commercial Impossibility
articles.summary: An analysis of how the Indian judiciary has evolved its reading of Section 56 of the Indian Contract Act in the wake of pandemic-era contract disputes.

articles.title: NDA Architecture: The Difference Between Enforceable and Decorative Confidentiality
articles.summary: Why most NDAs are structurally hollow — examining consideration, scope of confidential information, and enforcement remedies under Indian and common law.
